*All right, well Michael Nathanson, as a fellow founder, albeit much smalle=
r entities, I=E2=80=99m glad to have you on and I look forward to talking t=
o you again in the future.*

*MN:* Thank you, God bless. You too, be well, and let=E2=80=99s go Rangers.
